milestones.title: Acceptance probe loop foundations
milestones.summary: Add the planner-generated acceptance probe contract, executor adapter, and the worker activity that runs probes against an integration branch.
exitCriteria: AcceptanceProbe contract added to @pm-go/contracts with passing fixture and validator tests.
Executor adapter wires probe runs through the existing Claude runner with a budget cap.
spec-to-plan workflow can call the probe-runner activity end-to-end against the smoke fixture.

milestones.title: Probe-driven fix loop
milestones.summary: Wire probe failures into the task fix workflow so an implementer agent can pick up a probe-flagged task without operator intervention.
exitCriteria: Failed probe persists a TaskFixRequest and re-routes the task to the fix workflow.
Probe-driven fix completes a single retry cycle in the smoke test.
Per-task review gate still rejects fixes that drift the contract.

milestones.title: Operator surface for probe runs
milestones.summary: Surface probe runs in the API + CLI so operators can list, inspect, and rerun probes attached to a plan or phase.
exitCriteria: GET /plans/:id/probes returns the canonical probe-run history.
pm-go probes list / inspect / rerun commands are documented and tested.
Probe rerun honors the plan's existing budget envelope.

deferredScope: §8 Multi-repo probe routing — covered in a follow-up spec.
§9 Probe sharding for large plans — out of scope for v0.9.
